Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Anderson, for and with Lynniecea Bradley; Jaimie Wells for Santander Consumer USA, Inc.; Chris Brunia for Next Motors.

Court is adjourned.
